subcodes.first_line: O fruit of the sacred tree! I observed that which thy spiritual pen had written upon the tablet of conscience [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثمره شجره مقدسه آنچه از قلم روحانی در صفحه وجدانی مرقوم نموده بودی ملاحظه
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @firmness in the Covenant, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @spiritual transformation
